name: Attractive Character Intro Sequence (Epiphany Bridge Bonding)

source.primary: DotCom Secrets — Secret #6: The Attractive Character (4 Elements, 4 Identities, 6 Storylines)
supporting: Expert Secrets — The Epiphany Bridge Script (5 phases / 14 questions; adaptation of the Hero's Two Journeys)
DotCom Secrets — Secret #7: Soap Opera Sequence (open-loop, daily-cadence delivery mechanic)
Copywriting Secrets — Secret #18: Email Teasers (per-email mechanics)

purpose: Deliberately introduce the Attractive Character to a brand-new subscriber by rolling out the AC's Elements (Backstory, Parables, Character Flaws, Polarity), Identity (Leader / Adventurer / Reporter-Evangelist / Reluctant Hero), and Storylines across a multi-email arc structured by the Epiphany Bridge Script. For personal brands / experts where bonding with a PERSON is the whole game. It is the deeper / alternative arc to a product-led Soap Opera Sequence, emphasizing the AC persona rollout over a single product close.

trigger.what_starts_it: Opt-in on a personal-brand / expert funnel (hero funnel, story opt-in, expert lead magnet).
trigger.reentry_guard: Only enter if tag 'ac-intro-started' does NOT already exist

channels: optional short video per email (Epiphany Bridge video: podcast clip / FB Live / VSL)
cadence: 1 email/day for 5-6 days (auto-responder), mirroring the Soap Opera daily-cadence open-loop delivery.

sequence.purpose: Come down from the expert pedestal and return to where the reader is now. Share the AC backstory + external AND internal desires + the old vehicles you tried that didn't work. When they see you were once where they are, they trust you can take them where they want to go.
sequence.subject_angle: Before any of this worked, I was [relatable low point]
body_framework: Backstory that starts roughly where the listener is right now
External desire (the result you wanted) + internal desire (who you wanted to become)
Old vehicles you tried that failed (the wall begins to form)
Open loop to Email 2 (what happened next)

sequence.purpose: Introduce the villain and the conflict; hit the wall where the old way collapsed. Get vulnerable — share the internal struggle / character flaw. Vulnerability builds rapport faster than anything else because the audience shares the same struggle.
sequence.subject_angle: The day it all fell apart
body_framework: Name the villain / the moment of frustration
The wall: the old opportunity stopped working
Character Flaw element: get vulnerable about the internal struggle (fear, doubt, shame)
Open loop: 'then something changed — I'll tell you tomorrow'

sequence.beat: The Guide & The Epiphany / New Opportunity (Phase 3)
sequence.purpose: Who handed you the aha (the guide), the epiphany you experienced, and the new opportunity you created from it. Use the Amazing Discovery / Secret Telling storyline. This is the belief-shift moment.
body_framework: The guide who gave you the epiphany
The epiphany itself (the realization)
The new opportunity you created from it (vs the old way)
Soft CTA / open loop to the framework email

sequence.purpose: The strategy/framework you built to get the result. NAME it (proprietary framework name). Teach the WHAT (strategy), not the HOW (tactics). Use a Parable to make the lesson stick.
body_framework: Name the framework (proprietary)
Teach the strategy at a high level (the what, not the tactics)
Parable that illustrates the core principle
CTA toward the offer that delivers the framework

sequence.purpose: External result achieved + internal transformation. Before/After storyline. Third-Person Testimonials for social proof. Draw the Polarity line in the sand and invite the reader to join the movement / value ladder.
sequence.subject_angle: From [before] to [after] (and how you can too)
body_framework: Achievement: the external end result you accomplished
Transformation: how you changed internally (fear to courage)
Before/After + Third-Person Testimonials (social proof)
Polarity: us-vs-them line in the sand
Clear CTA to join / buy / ascend the value ladder

sequence.purpose: Declare the AC's Identity (Leader / Adventurer / Reporter-Evangelist / Reluctant Hero) explicitly and invite the reader into the tribe / next step. Optional capstone.
sequence.subject_angle: Why I do this (and the invitation)
body_framework: Declare the AC identity and the moral duty / mission
Restate the worldview line in the sand
Final invitation to the value ladder / community

copy_persona.the_who: The Attractive Character (DCS #6): 4 Elements (Backstory, Parables, Character Flaws, Polarity); choose ONE Identity (Leader / Adventurer / Reporter-Evangelist / Reluctant Hero); deploy the 6 Storylines (Loss & Redemption, Us vs Them, Before & After, Amazing Discovery, Secret Telling, Third-Person Testimonial)
copy_persona.the_structure: The Epiphany Bridge Script (Expert Secrets, 5 phases / 14 questions): Phase 1 Backstory (desire external+internal, old vehicles) → Phase 2 Journey/Conflict (villain, the wall) → Phase 3 New Opportunity (guide, epiphany, new opportunity) → Phase 4 The Framework/Plan (strategy) → Phase 5 Achievement & Transformation
copy_persona.the_delivery_mechanic: Soap Opera Sequence (DCS #7): daily cadence + open loops between emails
copy_persona.email_mechanics: Copywriting Secrets Email Teaser (Jim Edwards #18): subject = headline (question form), merged-name salutation, shocking statement, curiosity bullets, ONE CTA, friendly close. If each email links a video, the email's only job is the click to the video.

flexibility.core_principle: This template is a GUIDE and a RESOURCE, never a rule or requirement. It must not dominate the user's desire.

usage_modes.mode_1_explicit_desire: User has an explicit desire: do exactly what the user wants. This template is an optional reference only — never impose it or override the user's choice.
usage_modes.mode_2_unsure: User is unsure: suggest the 5-phase Epiphany Bridge structure (Backstory → Wall → Epiphany → Framework → Transformation) and explain why it works for personal-brand bonding, then let the user decide.
usage_modes.mode_3_just_do_it: User wants it handled ('just build it'): build the full 5–6 email sequence from this template — AC-01 through AC-06, tags, custom fields, if/else branches, video-engagement fork, and the GHL workflow — as written.

flexibility.always: Overridable, mixable, customizable, ignorable. Identity choice (Leader vs Adventurer vs Reporter-Evangelist vs Reluctant Hero), number of emails (5 vs 6), inclusion of video per email, open-loop intensity, and each storyline — all defaults the user can change or skip. The template assists; it never dominates.

ghl_build.builder: Skill 44 — Convert & Flow Operator (caf), Tier 0. Internal-API build when GOHIGHLEVEL_FIREBASE_REFRESH_TOKEN healthy; Tier 4 agent-browser backstop + owner nudge otherwise.

workflow.trigger: Form Submitted / Funnel Step Submitted (personal-brand opt-in). Filter: tag 'ac-intro-started' NOT present.
nodes: Action: Add to Workflow 'Daily Seinfeld enrollment' / value ladder
if_else_branches: Video-engagement fork: IF email's video link clicked THEN add tag 'engaged-video'; ELSE on next-day resend with 'in case you missed it' subject.
Buyer fork: IF core-offer purchased THEN exit remaining sales emails and route to buyer onboarding; ELSE continue.
Bond fork: on completion, IF 'engaged-video' present THEN add 'ac-bonded' (hot lead) for priority sales follow-up.
workflow.wait_steps: 5 wait steps of 1 day each (6 emails; E6 optional).
workflow.trinity_note: If any leg of this sequence uses an SMS or conversational-AI node, the TRINITY rule applies (3 legs) and caf QC runs qc-trinity-registry.sh as a hard gate.
workflow.skill44_reliability: Dependency-first; set node 'order' + 'parentKey' before first save; email nodes reference Email-Builder templates AC-01..AC-06.
